title: Integrations of Multiple Monday.com Accounts
excerpt:
Hi. I’m wondering if there is a way to integrate two monday.com accounts? 
So they would be separate accounts but we want to be able to streamline and integrate them within each other? 
Is this possible?

posts.author: marnieburke31 (Marnie Burke)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. I’m wondering if there is a way to integrate two monday.com accounts?
So they would be separate accounts but we want to be able to streamline and integrate them within each other?
Is this possible?

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @marnieburke31 , you can set up a 2-Way sync with zzBots that will keep your boards up to date in sync with the other. You may need to create new bot/automation in zzBots for every board you create.

If your interesting in getting this automated or need help setting up, just chat with us on our website.

Here is a link to get started: https://www.zzbots.com/store/mondaycom-mondaycom-2-way-sync
